zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Basset於1328年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特時，她的父親Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote13歲，母親Sibyl de Astley19歲。她於1353年1月與Robert Morton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1390年5月19日在英國萊希斯特斯爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Basset于1328年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote13岁，母亲Sibyl de Astley19岁。她于1353年1月与Robert Morton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1390年5月19日在英国萊希斯特斯爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Basset was born in 1328, in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote, was 13 and her mother, Sibyl de Astley, was 19. She married Robert Morton in January 1353. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 19 May 1390, in Leicestershire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Basset est née en 1328, à Sapcote, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Sibyl de Astley, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Morton en janvier 1353. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 mai 1390, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Basset 1328 in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote 13 und ihre Mutter Sibyl de Astley 19. Sie hat im Januar 1353 Robert Morton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. Mai 1390 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Basset è nata il nel 1328 nel Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Sibyl de Astley, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Robert Morton nel gennaio 1353. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 19 maggio 1390, nel Leicestershire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Bassetが1328年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアサプコトで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcoteは13歳，母Sibyl de Astleyは19歳であった。1353年1月にRobert Mortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1390年5月19日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Basset(이)가 1328년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 사p컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl de Astley(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1353년 1월 Robert Morton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1390년 5월 19일 영국 레이스스터실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Basset nasceu em 1328, em Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl de Astley, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Morton em janeiro de 1353. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 19 de maio de 1390, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Basset родилась в 1328 г. в местности сапкот, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Astley, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Morton январь 1353 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 19 мая 1390 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Basset nació en 1328, en Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph Basset 3rd Lord Basset of Sapcote, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Sibyl de Astley, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Robert Morton en enero de 1353. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1390, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
